description_long: This is a compact, modern submachine gun-style rifle with a matte black finish and a folding skeletal stock. The receiver is rectangular and robust, with a prominent detachable box magazine inserted below. The handguard is ribbed for grip and extends forward to a short barrel, which is capped with a simple muzzle. The trigger and pistol grip are ergonomically shaped, and the top of the receiver features a low-profile iron sight. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functionality, making it suitable for close-quarters urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black submachine gun-style rifle with a folding skeletal stock, ribbed handguard, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow muzzle, ribbed handguard, and the slim profile of the folding stock.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the folding skeletal stock, pistol grip, box magazine, and ribbed handguard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the folding stock and the compact width of the receiver.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the folding stock, magazine, and the overall streamlined profile of the rifle.
